content: A 2024-2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent can repurpose the fixed-contrastive MemoryBank architecture originally designed for self-supervised image representation learning as a dynamically growing, curiosity-filtered long-term memory store. This lets the agent sidestep working memory capacity bottlenecks that cripple long-horizon reasoning by only adding unexpected, high-curiosity experiences to the shared MemoryBank, rather than storing every interaction.
